queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating determinants of default associated with maintaining a critical account or managing other existing credits.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers and determinants of default: empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated loan default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the credit risk drivers associated with negative checking account balances and their contribution to elevated default probability.
